title: hedyosmos spicatus
intro: Hedyosmum spicatum, also known as the Spiked Hedyosmum or Spiked Bugbane, is a flowering plant in the barberry family that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and treat wounds. The health benefits of Hedyosmum spicatum include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Hedyosmum spicatum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
